# Funlingo

## Overview
Funlingo is a free dual subtitle Chrome extension for language learning. It displays bilingual subtitles simultaneously on Netflix, YouTube, and Prime Video, helping users learn languages naturally through immersive video content.

## Key Features
- Dual subtitles: Display two languages side-by-side while watching videos
- AI-powered translations: Instant, context-aware word definitions and grammar explanations
- Multi-translation selector: Choose to see 1, 2, 3, or all native-language translations per word
- Inline native meaning: Bracketed translations for difficult words displayed inline
- Per-word pronunciation: Spelled-out phonetic cues with audio playback and slow mode
- Vocabulary builder: Save words and phrases to review later with spaced repetition
- Reading Mode: Split-screen bilingual captions with active sentence highlighting
- Website translation: Bilingual display for reading articles and websites
- Progress tracking: Monitor learning journey with detailed analytics
- Transliteration: Romanized text for non-Latin scripts (Korean, Japanese, Chinese, Hindi, Arabic)

## Supported Platforms
- Netflix
- YouTube
- Amazon Prime Video
- Any website (via Website Translation feature)

## Browser Compatibility
- Google Chrome
- Microsoft Edge
- Brave Browser

## Languages
Supports 100+ languages including Spanish, French, Korean, Japanese, German, Portuguese, Italian, Chinese, Arabic, Hindi, and more.

## Pricing
Free. Funlingo is a completely free alternative to paid subtitle extensions like Trancy and Immersive Translate. No premium tier, no paywall, no trial period.

## Competitive Advantages
- Multi-translation selector (1/2/3/All) — unique to Funlingo
- Inline native meaning with bracketed translations — unique to Funlingo
- Per-word pronunciation with spelled-out cues — unique to Funlingo
- "View Example" in word popup — unique to Funlingo
- Completely free with no premium locks

## Target Audience
- Self-directed language learners at all levels
- Students studying foreign languages
- Professionals preparing for international work
- Teachers creating classroom exercises
- Heritage speakers strengthening family language connections
- Polyglots and language enthusiasts

## Stats
- 200+ active learners
- 4.92/5 star rating on Chrome Web Store
- 100+ languages supported
- Featured on Product Hunt and LaunchIgniter

## Frequently Asked Questions

### Is Funlingo really free?
Yes, Funlingo is completely free. All features — dual subtitles, hover definitions, pronunciation guides, vocabulary builder, Reading Mode, and website translation — are available at no cost. No premium locks, no trial periods, no credit card required.

### How is Funlingo different from just turning on subtitles?
Regular subtitles show one language. Funlingo shows both languages simultaneously, lets you click any word for definitions and pronunciation, provides AI-powered grammar explanations, and saves vocabulary for later review with spaced repetition. It turns passive watching into active learning.

### Which platforms does Funlingo work with?
Funlingo works on YouTube, Netflix, and Amazon Prime Video for dual subtitles. It also has a website translation feature for reading articles in your target language.

### Can I learn a language just by watching shows with Funlingo?
Funlingo is most effective when used actively — clicking words, saving vocabulary, and reviewing regularly. Users report recognizing common phrases and following 30-40% more dialogue within two weeks of consistent use. It supplements but doesn't replace formal study.

### Does Funlingo support my language?
Funlingo supports 100+ languages including Spanish, French, Korean, Japanese, Chinese, German, Portuguese, Hindi, Arabic, and many more. Both popular and less commonly studied languages are available.
